approval.title: Sensitive approval required
approval.body: A credit memo, debit note, write-off, or void approval is waiting before the next financial transition can complete.

edit.title: Edit Invoice Summary
edit.description: Update due date, payment terms, and settlement metadata while preserving the AR audit trail.

issue.title: Issue AR Invoice
issue.description: Move this draft invoice into the AR ledger and open receivable aging.

approve.title: Approve Sensitive Action
approve.description: Approve the pending credit, debit, write-off, or void action before it posts.

allocate.title: Allocate Payment
allocate.description: Apply a voucher or payment to this invoice and keep any excess as unapplied credit.

reverse.title: Reverse Allocation
reverse.description: Reverse a prior allocation and restore invoice balance and customer AR exposure.

credit.title: Create Credit Memo
credit.description: Post or request approval for a customer credit against this invoice.

debit.title: Create Debit Note
debit.description: Post or request approval for a debit adjustment that increases exposure.

writeoff.title: Write Off Invoice
writeoff.description: Write off part or all of the remaining receivable with approval control.

void.title: Void AR Invoice
void.description: Void this invoice after the required approval has been completed.

errors.actionFailed: The AR action could not be completed.
